title: Nostr
description: Nostr is an open protocol for relayed social communication using public-key identities. It is relevant to Bitcoin culture because it extends censorship-resistant coordination beyond payments.

resources.title: Nostr NIPs Repository
resources.notes: Canonical protocol specifications and evolution process.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for the wallet, transaction, and protocol ideas that support this topic.

resources.title: NIP-01: Basic Protocol Flow
resources.notes: Minimal baseline for events, signatures, and relay behavior.
